channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: New shoots from tree trunks blocking sight at crossroads by College Bath Road and turning right on to Keyndham rd., 7th June
item.description:
Outside firestation opposite lido

item.title: Possible stream blockage of Hatherley Brook, 7th June
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Meadow Close, Hatherley, Cheltenham, Cheltenham

item.title: Small drain cover is broken, 7th June
item.description:
Drain outside No 2 Rhapsody Court has broken and is missing. Health and Safety issue - child has already had a close call with trapping an ankle.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Symphony Road, Badgeworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:
3 Ryeworth Road, Charlton Kings

item.title: Really dirty toilets, 7th June
item.description:
Really useful to have public toilets next to a kids park but they are so dirty. Can they be cleaned properly- scrubbed and bleached, toilet brushes replaced, repainted
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Saint Arvans Court, Marle Hill, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Junction of Gotherington Lane and Sanderling Way roundabout, 7th June
item.description:
Complete lack of maintenance, tall weeds in gutters, 3 foot weeds almost growing into a bush on roundabout. Footpaths restricted by overgrown bushes on Sanderling Way restricting the full used of the pathways particularly for mother with pushchairs. The maintenance of this area is sadly lacking where tall weeds are allowed to grow and obscure the gutters. Very unsightly. Thank You.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 16, Sanderling Way, Bishop's Cleeve, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Have to walk on the road with a pushchair as brambles overgrown pathway, 7th June
item.description:
All the way up Ermin street

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 34, Ermin Street, Brockworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Top half of tree has fallen down, fell on road prior to moving, 7th June
item.description:
Just outside a private road on Watts Close, next to house number 6

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Watts Close, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tenant who has moved out of 4A Glenville Parade has filled the bins with wood and his household furniture and left a table in the car park and gym equipment, 7th June
item.description:
As above it was the tenant who dumped all of his household items which is cctv by the carpark which is private it is him equipment, wood the bins lids do not shut
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Erminster Drive, Hucclecote, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dangerous exposed wires, 7th June
item.description:
Lampost has dangerous wires exposed. I reported this as an emergency on the 26th May on 08000514514, but no action, has been carried out.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 210, Hatherley Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
